title: FlyamPack
description: Optimizing and flexible assembly for Minecraft
body:
## Simple and optimizing assembly for comfortable playing Minecraft ![flyampack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dda9d3492b3f7f346eddbe0c3b2a95696864e200_0.webp) **A few advantages of my build:** - A lot of fps in places where there are a lot of players - There are pre-installed shaders - The assembly comes immediately with all configs and settings - There are all mods for a good start on the server - Visual enhancement - And much more
Modpack Contents 1.20.1

- [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity) - A Fabric mod that allows for efficient connected textures. - [Plasmo Voice](https://modrinth.com/plugin/plasmo-voice) - A proximity voice chat mod with audio positioning and lots of features. - [More Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/moreculling) - A mod that changes how multiple types of culling are handled in order to improve performance. - [ImmediatelyFast](https://modrinth.com/mod/immediatelyfast) - Speed up immediate mode rendering in Minecraft. - [Capes](https://modrinth.com/mod/capes) - Lets you use capes from OptiFine, LabyMod and other cape mods. - [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) - A modern rendering engine for Minecraft which greatly improves performance. - [Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) - Emissive, Random & Custom texture support for entities in resourcepacks just like Optifine but for Fabric. - [Stendhal](https://modrinth.com/mod/stendhal) - Stendhal is a client-side Fabric mod offering new and enhanced visual utilities for books, signs, anvil and the in-game chat. - [Boat Item View](https://modrinth.com/mod/boat-item-view) - See your held items when in a moving boat. - [Reese's Sodium Options](https://modrinth.com/mod/reeses-sodium-options) - Alternative Options Menu for Sodium. - [Chat Animation](https://modrinth.com/mod/chatanimation) - Makes chat messages appear with a smooth animation. - [AppleSkin](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin) - Food/hunger-related HUD improvements. - [Perspective Mod Redux](https://modrinth.com/mod/perspective-mod-redux) - 360 degree third person view. - [Starlight](https://modrinth.com/mod/starlight) - Rewrites the light engine to fix lighting performance and lighting errors. - [Noxesium](https://modrinth.com/mod/noxesium) - Improves client performance and play experience on large multiplayer servers. - [Bobby](https://modrinth.com/mod/bobby) - Allows for render distances greater than the server's view-distance. - [Isometric Renders](https://modrinth.com/mod/isometric-renders) - Creates high-resolution isometric screenshots of game objects. - [Axiom](https://modrinth.com/mod/axiom) - The all-in-one tool for editing Minecraft Worlds. - [Entity Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling) - Using async path-tracing to hide Block-/Entities that are not visible. - [Memory Leak Fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/memoryleakfix) - A mod that fixes random memory leaks for both the client and server. - [ReplayMod](https://modrinth.com/mod/replaymod) - A Minecraft Mod to record, relive and share your experience. - [Enhanced Block Entities](https://modrinth.com/mod/ebe) - Reduce block entity FPS lag with almost no compromises, and improve their visuals. - [Skin Swapper](https://modrinth.com/mod/skinswapper) - A mod that lets you change your skin in game using a GUI. - [Indium](https://modrinth.com/mod/indium) - Sodium addon providing support for the Fabric Rendering API, based on Indigo. - [Sodium Extra](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium-extra) - A Sodium addon that adds features that shouldn't be in Sodium. - [Model Gap Fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/modelfix) - Fixes gaps in Block Models and Item Models. - [Resourcify](https://modrinth.com/mod/resourcify) - In-game resource pack, data pack and shader browser and updater. - [Ok Boomer](https://modrinth.com/mod/ok-boomer) - A no-nonsense zoom mod for cool kids that want to look really close at explosions. - [Nvidium](https://modrinth.com/mod/nvidium) - Fast nvidia only rendering engine for sodium. - [Concurrent Chunk Management Engine](https://modrinth.com/mod/c2me-fabric) - A Fabric mod designed to improve the chunk performance of Minecraft. - [Chat Heads](https://modrinth.com/mod/chat-heads) - See who you're chatting with. - [Iris Shaders](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris) - A modern shaders mod for Minecraft intended to be compatible with existing OptiFine shader packs. - [Custom Entity Models](https://modrinth.com/mod/cem) - Custom Entity Models suport on Fabric. - [ClickThrough](https://modrinth.com/mod/clickthrough) - Click through signs and item frames to chests. - [Draggable Lists](https://modrinth.com/mod/draggable-lists) - Draggable resource packs, datapacks, servers and worlds. - [Wildfire's Female Gender Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/female-gender) - The Female Gender Mod introduces extra player model customization options, including a unique feature that adds a personalized touch to your avatar. - [Wakes](https://modrinth.com/mod/wakes) - Adds splashes and wakes while traveling on water. - [Krypton](https://modrinth.com/mod/krypton) - A mod to optimize the Minecraft networking stack. - [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium) - No-compromises game logic/server optimization mod. - [Dark Loading Screen](https://modrinth.com/mod/dark-loading-screen) - Makes the loading screen darker. - [No Telemetry](https://modrinth.com/mod/no-telemetry) - Disable the telemetry introduced in 21w38a. - [LazyDFU](https://modrinth.com/mod/lazydfu) - Makes the game boot faster by deferring non-essential initialization. - [RP Renames](https://modrinth.com/mod/rp-renames) - See what CIT and CEM Renames are in your Resource Packs. - [TieFix](https://modrinth.com/mod/tiefix) - Fixes some annoying bugs in the Minecraft client. - [Action Bar Info](https://modrinth.com/mod/abi) - Display info in action bar. - [Screenshot Viewer](https://modrinth.com/mod/screenshot-viewer) - View your screenshots in game. - [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) - Adds a mod menu to view the list of mods you have installed. - [Creator Overlays](https://modrinth.com/mod/creatoroverlays) - This Mod adds a variety of useful Overlays to the game, such as the Rule of Thirds gridlines, Vertical Video framing and more, and is perfect for use with Replay Mod. - [Ears](https://modrinth.com/mod/ears) - More skin customization options for just about every version. - [ModernFix](https://modrinth.com/mod/modernfix) - All-in-one mod that improves performance, reduces memory usage, and fixes many bugs. - [Particle Rain](https://modrinth.com/mod/particle-rain) - Replaces rain with particle effects. - [View Distance Fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/view-distance-fix) - A server side Fabric mod that fixes the fog when having a higher render distance on the client than on the server. - [CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn) - Re-implements MCPatcher's CIT. - [Emotecraft](https://modrinth.com/mod/emotecraft) - Create your own emotes in Minecraft. - [ No Chat Reports](https://modrinth.com/mod/no-chat-reports) - Makes chat unreportable (where possible). - [Don't Clear Chat History](https://modrinth.com/mod/dcch) - Updated fork. Simple one-mixin mod that doesn't clear the messages you've sent from up arrow on disconnect/relog. - [Language Reload](https://modrinth.com/mod/language-reload) - Reduces load times and adds fallbacks for languages. - [FerriteCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core) - Memory usage optimizations. - [ThreadTweak](https://modrinth.com/mod/threadtweak) - Improve and tweak Minecraft thread scheduling. - [Very Many Players](https://modrinth.com/mod/vmp-fabric) - A Fabric mod designed to improve server performance at high playercounts. - [Status Effect Bars](https://modrinth.com/mod/status-effect-bars) - Adds customizable bars to the status effects overlay to show the remaining duration of effects. - [Smooth Swapping](https://modrinth.com/mod/smooth-swapping) - Moves items smoothly in inventories. - [Exordium](https://modrinth.com/mod/exordium) - Render the GUI and screens at a lower framerate to speed up what's really important: the worldrendering. - [LambDynamicLights](https://modrinth.com/mod/lambdynamiclights) - A dynamic lights mod for Fabric. - [Litematica](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/litematica) - mod for a convenient device. - [WorldEdit](https://modrinth.com/plugin/worldedit) - A Minecraft Map Editor... that runs in-game. - [Axolotl Buckets](https://modrinth.com/mod/axolotl-buckets) - Allows axolotls in buckets to have their own icon based on their color and age. - [Better Ping Display](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-ping-display-fabric) - Displays the ping of each player in the player list as a number. - [Borderless Mining](https://modrinth.com/mod/borderless-mining) - Changes the full screen mode to use a borderless window. - [Cherished Worlds](https://modrinth.com/mod/cherished-worlds) - Favorite/pin/bookmark specific worlds, which will always be at the top of the list and cannot be deleted. - [EasierVillagerTrading](https://modrinth.com/mod/easiervillagertrading) - Fewer clicks to trade with villagers. - [FeyTweaks](https://modrinth.com/mod/feytweaks) - Mod for optimizing signs and beacons. - [Language Reload](https://modrinth.com/mod/language-reload) - Reduces loading times and adds fallback options for languages. - [Recursive Resources](https://modrinth.com/mod/recursiveresources) - Improves the Resource Pack menu with folder support. - [Sound Controller](https://modrinth.com/mod/sound-controller) - Provides complete control over the volume of every sound in the game. - [Too Many Players](https://modrinth.com/mod/tmp) - Allows you to increase FPS with a large crowd of players. - [Fast IP Ping ](https://modrinth.com/mod/fast-ip-ping) - Yeet the laggy reversed DNS lookup for literal IP server addresses. - [Online Emotes](https://modrinth.com/mod/online-emotes) - Allows players to see each other's emotes without emotecraft installed on the server. - [Not Enough Crashes](https://modrinth.com/mod/notenoughcrashes) - When crashing, you can go back to the title screen and keep playing, without needing to restart, alongside other things to make crashes more pleasant. - [Not Enough Animations](https://modrinth.com/mod/not-enough-animations) - Bringing first-person animations to the third-person. - [Elytra Physics](https://modrinth.com/mod/elytra-physics) - A simple mod that adds cape-like physics to the elytra when worn by the player. - [Shulker Box Tooltip](https://modrinth.com/mod/shulkerboxtooltip) - View the contents of shulker boxes from your inventory. - [ViaFabricPlus](https://modrinth.com/mod/viafabricplus) - Fabric mod to connect to EVERY Minecraft server version. - [pv-addon-replaymod](https://modrinth.com/mod/pv-addon-replaymod) - A fork of Replay Voice Chat that works with Plasmo Voice allowing you to record voice chat with ReplayMod. - [Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) - OptiFine format, Custom Entity Model replacement mod available for Fabric and Forge. - [Xaero's World Map](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-world-map) - Adds a full screen world map which shows you what you have explored in the world. Works great together with Xaero's Minimap. - [Xaero's Minimap](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap) - Displays a map of the nearby world terrain. - [World Play Time](https://modrinth.com/mod/world-play-time) - Displays the world's play time in the world selection menu. - [Figura](https://modrinth.com/mod/figura) - A client-side mod that allows for extensive customization of the player model. - [SPWorlds Nav](https://modrinth.com/mod/spwn) - Mod to view what branch you are on, or at what coordinates, branch you are on. - [Xaero's Map Chest Tracker Integration](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-map-chest-tracker-integration) - This mod lets you see the results of Chest Tracker in the Xaero's map. - [AdvancementInfo](https://modrinth.com/mod/advancementinfo) - Show more information about advancement requirements. **Dependencies:** - [YetAnotherConfigLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl) - A builder-based configuration library for Minecraft. - [Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) - Configuration Library for Minecraft Mods. - [MaLiLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/malilib) - A library mod for client-side mods. - [Fabric Language Kotlin](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-language-kotlin) - This is a mod that enables usage of the Kotlin programming language for Fabric mods. - [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) - Lightweight and modular API providing common hooks and intercompatibility measures utilized by mods using the Fabric toolchain. - [Carpet](https://modrinth.com/mod/carpet) - Take full control over your vanilla game. - [oωo (owo-lib)](https://modrinth.com/mod/owo-lib) - A general utility, GUI and config library for modding on Fabric and Quilt. - [Architectury API](https://modrinth.com/mod/architectury-api) - An intermediary api aimed to ease developing multiplatform mods. - [Quilt Kotlin Libraries (QKL)](https://modrinth.com/mod/qkl) - Quilt's official Kotlin libraries. - [Quilted Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/qsl) - The standard libraries of the Quilt ecosystem. Essential for your modding experience on Quilt.
Modpack Contents 1.21

- Action Bar Info - AlinLib - Animatica - AppleSkin - Axiom - BadOptimizations - Better Ping Display - BetterF3 - Blur+ - Bobby - Capes - Carpet - Chat Heads - Chest Tracker - CIT Resewn - Click Through - Cloth Config - Dark Loading Screen - DCCH - Debugify - Ears - Enhanced Block Entities - Entity Model Features - Entity Texture Features - EntityCulling - Fabric Language Kotlin - Fabrishot - FerriteCore - ImmediatelyFast - Indium - Iris - Isometric Renders - Krypton - Language Reload - Litematica - Lithium - MaLiLib - Mod Menu - Model Gap Fix - ModernFix - More Culling - No Chat Reports - Noisium - Noxesium - ObsidianUI - oωo - Particle Rain - Placeholder API - Plasmo Voice - Reese's Sodium Options - Remove Reloading Screen - Resourcify - RP Renames - RyoamicLights - SkinShuffle - Sodium - Sound Controller - Sound Physics Remastered - Status Effect Bars - Stendhal - Symbol Chat - ThreadTweak - ViaFabricPlus - Villager Trading Plus - Wakes - WI Zoom - Xaero's Minimap - Xaero's World Map - YetAnotherConfigLib - Concentration - NoEmotecraft - Flashback - Sodium Extra - Talking Heads - Tetris MC - Technical Utilities - Chat Animation - Continuity - Online Emotes - Trial Spawner Timer - Playeranimator - Smooth Scrolling Refurbished - Perspective
Modpack Contents 1.21.1

- Action Bar Info - AppleSkin - AutoReconnect - Autototem - Axiom - Better Ping Display - Better Tab - BetterF3 - Boat Item View - Bobby - Capes - Chat Heads - Chat Patches - Chest Tracker - CIT Resewn - ClickThrough Plus - ClientSort - Concentration - Continuity - CreativeCore - Ears - Emotecraft - Emotecraft Flashback Addon - Enhanced Block Entities - Entity Model Features - Entity Texture Features - EntityCulling - Fast Recipe - Figura - Flashback - Held Item Tooltips - ImmediatelyFast - Iris - LambDynamicLights - Language Reload - Litematica - Mod Menu - Model Gap Fix - More Culling - MoreDensityFunctions - My Totem Doll - Nether Coords - Noisium - NotEnoughAnimations - Online Emotes - Particle Core - Particle Rain - perspektive - Plasmo Voice - Player Animator - Reese's Sodium Options - Replay Mod - RP Renames - SchematicPreview - ShowYourself - Shulker Box Tooltip - Smooth Scroll - Sodium - Sodium Extra - Sound Controller - Sound Physics Remastered - Status Effect Bars - Symbol Chat - Talking Heads - Tetris MC - ViaFabricPlus - Villager Trading Plus - Wakes - WI Zoom - Wildfire's Female Gender Mod - Xaero's Minimap - Xaero's World Map **Dependencies:** - AlinLib - Architectury - CreativeCore - Fabric Language Kotlin - Konkrete - MaLiLib - oωo - Placeholder API - Puzzles Lib - YetAnotherConfigLib - Forge Config API Port - Fzzy Config
